help.title: Help Centre
help.subtitle: How can we help you today?
help.faq_1_a: Click on the 'Post' tab in the bottom menu and fill in the details of your item.
help.faq_2_a: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption to protect your personal information.
help.support_text: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any queries or issues.

privacy.title: Account Privacy
privacy.profile_visible_desc: Allow others to see your profile details and listings.
privacy.show_last_seen_desc: Show when you were last active on the app.
privacy.show_online_status_desc: Show a dot when you are currently active.
privacy.show_phone_desc: Display your phone number on your profile and listings.
privacy.read_receipts_desc: If turned off, you won't send or receive read receipts.
privacy.allow_messages_desc: Allow people you don't follow to send you messages.
privacy.2fa_active_desc: Your account is protected with an extra layer of security.
privacy.2fa_inactive_desc: Enable two-step verification to protect your account from unauthorized access.
privacy.2fa_info: When logging in from a new device, we will ask for a verification code sent to your registered email or phone.
privacy.two_step_desc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
privacy.request_data_desc: Get a copy of your personal Vendo data.
privacy.footer_text: Your privacy settings help you control who can interact with you on Vendo. We prioritize your data security.
